name: fabrik
description: The Fabrik plugin marketplace — ambient awareness of Fabrik (a GitHub-Project-driven SDLC pipeline orchestrator) for your interactive Claude Code session.

plugins.name: fabrik
plugins.description: Ambient awareness of Fabrik for the human's interactive Claude Code session. Turns Claude into a product-management buddy and supervisor for projects that use Fabrik to automate issue processing through a configurable SDLC pipeline (Specify, Research, Plan, Implement, Review, Validate).
